results.rendered_html:
avaghuṣ 1 P.
1 To proclaim aloud.
2 To send for, summon, convoke; as a conclave (samāja).
3 To fill with cries, make resonant; nadīṣu kauṃcāvaghuṣṭāsu  Mb.
